peakIterationData.feedback: In Logo, add a small outward offset before drawing each motif, e.g. increase the random `forward` jump from the center by 20–40 pixels before each circle/star so elements distribute into a wider asymmetric halo instead of stacking in the middle.

baselines.code:
TO petal :r :a :c
SETPC :c
SETPW 2
REPEAT 2 [ARC :a :r RT 180-:a]
END

TO rosette :size :n
REPEAT :n [
  petal :size 70 (RANDOM 15)+1
  RT 360/:n
]
END

TO spiralburst :steps :len :turn
REPEAT :steps [
  SETPC (RANDOM 15)+1
  SETPW 1 + RANDOM 4
  FD :len
  ARC 20 (8 + RANDOM 30)
  RT :turn + RANDOM 40
  FD :len/2
  BK :len + :len/2
  LT :turn/2
  MAKE "len :len + 3
]
END

TO vine :steps :len
REPEAT :steps [
  SETPC (RANDOM 15)+1
  SETPW 2 + RANDOM 3
  ARC 35 :len
  RT 25
  CIRCLE 4 + RANDOM 10
  LT 50
  ARC 25 :len/2
  RT 15 + RANDOM 35
  MAKE "len :len + 2
]
END

TO shard :len
REPEAT 3 [
  SETPC (RANDOM 15)+1
  SETPW 1 + RANDOM 4
  FD :len
  RT 120 + RANDOM 40
]
END

TO cluster :n :step
REPEAT :n [
  PU
  RT RANDOM 360
  FD 20 + RANDOM 140
  PD
  RT RANDOM 360
  rosette (10 + RANDOM 40) (5 + RANDOM 8)
  spiralburst (12 + RANDOM 14) (4 + RANDOM 10) (12 + RANDOM 40)
  PU
  BK 20 + RANDOM 140
  LT RANDOM 360
  PD
  RT :step
]
END

TO ribbons :n :len
REPEAT :n [
  SETPC (RANDOM 15)+1
  SETPW 2 + RANDOM 5
  ARC (20 + RANDOM 120) :len
  RT 60 + RANDOM 120
  ARC (20 + RANDOM 120) (:len/2 + RANDOM 30)
  LT 40 + RANDOM 90
]
END

]

TO spiralburst :steps :len :turn
REPEAT :steps [
  SETPC (RANDOM 15)+1
  SETPW 1 + RANDOM 4
  FD :len
  ARC 20 (8 + RANDOM 30)
  RT :turn + RANDOM 40
  FD :len/2
  BK :len + :len/2
  LT :turn/2
  MAKE "len :len + 3
]
END

TO vine :steps :len

  SETPC (RANDOM 15)+1

  ARC 35 :len

  RT 15 + RANDOM 35
  MAKE "len :len + 2
]

]

TO cluster :n :step

  PU
  RT RANDOM 360

  PD
  RT RANDOM 360
  rosette (10 + RANDOM 40) (5 + RANDOM 8)
  spiralburst (12 + RANDOM 14) (4 + RANDOM 10) (12 + RANDOM 40)

  BK 20 + RANDOM 140
  LT RANDOM 360
  PD
  RT :step
]
END

TO ribbons :n :len

  LT 40 + RANDOM 90
]
END
